rows.label: tlk45100252_02_msg0001
rows.name:
Father? Mother? Everyone?
Why did you all leave
before me?

rows.label: tlk45100252_02_msg0002
rows.name:
How can I live on all alone?
I don't understand...
What should I do?

rows.label: tlk45100252_02_msg0003
rows.name:
If I wait here, will someone
come help me? Will someone
save me?

rows.label: tlk45100252_02_msg0004
rows.name:
Someone[ML:Dash ]tell me this
is just a dream[ML:Dash ]
